case_title: DUMBHALIA, TONY vs. GUTIERREZ, ROGELIO et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, ROGELIO
